# species.shifts ![](articles/images/package_hex.svg)

The goal of `species.shifts` is to consolidate a variety of federal data
sets commonly used by the [**Gulf of Maine Research
Institute**](https://www.gmri.org/) in Portland, Maine. Many of the data
sets support collaborations with the New England, Mid-Atlantic, and
South Atlantic Fisheries Management Councils. This package pulls,
cleans, and analyzes these data sets from a pre-existing data
repository. Many of these data sets are confidential and/or require an
explicit data request from the relevant bodies. Given data acquisition,
it is recommended to store all data in a central repository for ease of
access within the R functions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Work flow

There are a set of functions within this package to pull, clean, and
plot federal fisheries data. Any `pull_()` function will read in and
clean the data from the corresponding data set.

[`species_list()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/species_list.md)
contains a list of species that are of interest to the [Mid-Atlantic
Fisheries Management Council](https://www.mafmc.org/). It contains how
these species are named in each particular data set and a `clean_name`,
which is the same across all data sets. If species need to be added or
removed before subsequent analyses, please amend this function as
needed.

All functions that begin with `map_()` or `plot_()` will filter to the
species of interest, so long as they are included in the species list.
The `pull_()` function for that particular data set will need to be run
prior to any plotting function.

*In development:* `indicators()` will analyze and return a specific set
of species distribution shift indicators for a particular species or set
of species.

All three groups of functions will ultimately yield the materials needed
to generate a **summary report**, describing the patterns of
distribution as described across the federal fishery dependent and
independent data sets.

![](articles/images/package_data_flow.svg)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Featured Data Sets

[NOAA Fisheries Vessel Trip
Reports](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/inport/item/11489)

[NEFSC Observer at
Sea](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/inport/item/24111)

[NEFSC Spring-Fall Bottom Trawl
Survey](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/inport/item/22557)

[GARFO Permits Data](https://apps-garfo.fisheries.noaa.gov/permits/)

[GARFO Dealer Reported
Landings](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/contact/greater-atlantic-regional-fisheries-office)

[NOAA Fisheries Marine Recreational Information
Program](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/insight/marine-recreational-information-program)

## Installation

You can install the development version from
[GitHub](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/www.github.com)
with:

``` r

devtools::install_github("https://github.com/carlylovas/species.shifts")
```

## Vignettes

[Accessing and cleaning federal fisheries
data](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/vignettes/data_cleaning_functions.html)

[Plotting federal fisheries
data](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/vignettes/plotting_functions.html)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`map_nefsc()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/map_nefsc.md)
  : Map NEFSC biomass data
- [`map_nefsc_cob()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/map_nefsc_cob.md)
  : Map NEFSC Bottom Trawl Center of Biomass
- [`map_observer()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/map_observer.md)
  : Plot observer data
- [`map_permits()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/map_permits.md)
  : Map permits by type along NEUS coast.
- [`map_vtr()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/map_vtr.md)
  : Plot vessel trip report data
- [`plot_council_landings()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_council_landings.md)
  : Plotting landings proportions by ASMFC Council Management Zones
- [`plot_council_permits()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_council_permits.md)
  : Plotting permit proportions by Management Councils.
- [`plot_landings_trends()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_landings_trends.md)
  : Plotting landings trends
- [`plot_nefsc_centers()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_nefsc_centers.md)
  : Plot NEFSC Bottom Trawl Center of Biomass
- [`plot_nefsc_edges()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_nefsc_edges.md)
  : Plot edges of distribution
- [`plot_permit_edges()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_permit_edges.md)
  : Plotting permit 5th, 50th, and 95th weighted percentiles of
  latitudinal distribtion.
- [`plot_state_landings()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_state_landings.md)
  : Plotting landings proportions by state
- [`plot_state_permits()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/plot_state_permits.md)
  : Plotting permit proportions by state
- [`pull_garfo_landings()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/pull_garfo_landings.md)
  : Pull federal landings data
- [`pull_mrip_catch()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/pull_mrip_catch.md)
  : Pull federal MRIP catch estimates
- [`pull_mrip_directed_trips()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/pull_mrip_directed_trips.md)
  : Extract MRIP Directed Trip Estimates for Multiple Species
- [`pull_nefsc()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/pull_nefsc.md)
  : Pull NEFSC survdat data
- [`pull_observer()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/pull_observer.md)
  : Pull federal observer data
- [`pull_permits()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/pull_permits.md)
  : Pull federal permits data
- [`pull_vtr()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/pull_vtr.md)
  : Pull federal VTR data
- [`species_list()`](https://carlylovas.github.io/species.shifts/reference/species_list.md)
  : Mid-Atlantic Species
